shows.title: Symptoms & Healing / Spiritual First-Aid
shows.first_half: First Half: Author and functional medicine expert Dr. Tom O’Bryan discusses the relationship between symptoms and healing, emphasizing why both must be understood to restore health. He’ll also address brain inflammation —its causes and how it may contribute to dementia.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Author Rick Wagner explores the link between the paranormal and personal well-being, offering “spiritual first aid” to help distinguish psychological stress from genuine supernatural experiences. He’ll share insights from his own journey and client stories, along with ways to understand and protect oneself.

shows.title: Black Dahlia Case / Open Lines
shows.first_half: Guest host Richard Syrett will be joined by executive producer Eli Frankel for a discussion on one of the most famous unsolved murders in American history, the Black Dahlia, and the long-overlooked top suspect in the investigation, who was traced by Los Angeles Police detectives to another murder in Kansas City six years earlier. Frankel will present, through extensive new discoveries and research, the final evidence linking the two murders. Followed by Open Lines in the latter half. Give Richard a call and discuss whatever is on your mind!
